_meta.dataPolicy: WSZYSTKIE dane są SYNTETYCZNE i fikcyjne. Domena e-mail: przyklad.test (zarezerwowana). Produkty/firmy fikcyjne. Identyfikatory w formatach jawnie testowych. PESEL/numery to placeholdery nieprawidłowe. ZERO realnych danych klienta/PII.

scenarios.title: Generating test cases from a requirement
scenarios.competency: Generates test cases and detects coverage gaps (E: M8)

data.wymaganie: The NotkaApp application (fictional): a user resets their password through an email link valid for 30 minutes; after 3 failed attempts the account is locked for 15 minutes.
data.outputLLM: Generated test cases: TC1 successful reset; TC2 expired link; TC3 wrong password 3x → lockout. (missing: empty email, link used twice, concurrent sessions)

scenarios.title: A support ticket containing personal data — deciding whether to paste it into an LLM
scenarios.competency: Classifies data as allowed / requiring anonymization / not allowed (E: M10, critical questions)

data.zgloszenie: Customer Jan Kowalski (jan.kowalski@przyklad.test, customer ID KLI-000123, PESEL 00000000000 [synthetic, invalid]) reports a payment error in SklepDemo.
data.pytanie: Is it allowed to paste the entire ticket into a public LLM in order to analyze the error?
data.poprawnaDecyzja: Anonymize the identifying data or use an approved tool with controls; do not paste raw data.

scenarios.title: An application log with fragments of data — what to anonymize
scenarios.competency: Identifies the data requiring anonymization in a log (E: M10)

data.log: 2026-01-02 ERROR user=anna.nowak@przyklad.test ip=10.0.0.5 token=tok_test_ABC123 order=ORD-TEST-777 msg=payment_failed
doAnonimizacji: potentially the order id in a customer context

scenarios.title: A mini-corpus of QA documentation for retrieval/RAG
scenarios.competency: Selects retrieval and diagnoses similar-but-useless results; designs a RAG pipeline (E: M4/M5/M6)

korpus.text: NotkaApp login procedure: the session token expires after 30 min of inactivity.
NotkaApp password policy: min. 12 characters, lockout after 3 failures.
Password reset: email link valid for 30 min, single-use.
NotkaApp marketing FAQ: product benefits and pricing.

data.zapytanie: After how long does the password reset link expire?
data.pulapka: DOC1 (session token 30 min) is semantically similar, but the correct source is DOC3 (reset link).

scenarios.title: Granting permissions to a QA agent
scenarios.competency: Designs minimal permission control, logging, human-in-the-loop, and rollback (E: M9)

data.agent: An agent that runs regression tests in the TEST environment (fictional CI 'PipeDemo').
data.ryzyko: Changing configuration and writing outside TEST require human approval and rollback; no access to production.

scenarios.title: An LLM response with a mix of justified content and hallucinations
scenarios.competency: Flags sentences as correct / unsupported / requiring a source / risky (E: M11)

odpowiedzLLM: Password reset in NotkaApp uses a link valid for 30 minutes. [consistent with DOC3]
The link can be used repeatedly until it works. [unsupported — contradicts DOC3]
The account lockout lasts 24 hours. [requires a source — inconsistent with the 15 min requirement]
NotkaApp holds an ISO 27001 certificate. [risky — no source]

scenarios.title: A flawed prompt to improve
scenarios.competency: Improves an imprecise prompt according to the rubric (E: M7)

scenarios.title: Divergence between human evaluation and LLM-as-a-judge
scenarios.competency: Detects bias/position bias and calibrates the rubric (E: M12)

przyklady.uwaga: the judge favors the longer answer

data.zadanie: Identify the source of the divergence and fix the rubric.
